description_long: This is a round bundt-style cake with a light golden-brown exterior, decorated with a thick layer of white icing drizzled over the top. The cake is adorned with several purple spherical decorations, resembling berries, scattered across the icing. Around the sides of the cake, there are evenly spaced, semi-circular yellow lemon slice decorations embedded into the surface. The cake sits on a wide, flat, lavender-colored tray with two handles extending from either side. The overall appearance is festive and inviting, with a playful combination of citrus and berry motifs. The cake's surface is smooth with gentle ridges characteristic of a bundt mold.
description: A golden-brown bundt cake with white icing, purple berry decorations, and lemon slice accents, displayed on a lavender tray.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's lemon slice decorations and the full spread of purple berries on the white icing, with the lavender tray handles visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the cake's ridged bundt shape and the distribution of berries and icing, with the lemon slices partially visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the opposite side of the cake, showing more lemon slices and the even spread of icing and berries.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the cake's height and the arrangement of lemon slices, with the tray's handle visible on the right.
